prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—sits at a wooden desk in a warm university classroom, surrounded by other chibi creature classmates in neighboring seats. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, looking around the room with quiet self-consciousness, framed by delicate purple eyebrows slightly raised. Its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm, hangs on the back of the chair. The classroom has warm honey-toned wood surfaces, large windows letting in golden afternoon light, and a green chalkboard surface (blank) at the front. Other chibi students sit relaxed and casual. The atmosphere is academic and warm. no text

The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—looks at its own reflection in a small handheld mirror with intense distress, seeing messy, disheveled hair sticking up in wild directions. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, wide with horrified self-scrutiny, framed by delicate purple eyebrows pinched with dismay. Its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm, is on its back. In the mirror's reflection, the messy hair looks catastrophic and unmissable. Behind the character, completely out of focus, classmates go about their business without a second glance. The mirror dominates the foreground—a portal into the character's self-critical perception. Warm classroom lighting. no text

prompts.narration_snippet: Researchers tracked students over a semester,
prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A large wall calendar flips through its pages in rapid sequence—weeks passing visually as the pages flip from one month to the next. Below the calendar, a small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—changes appearance day to day in a rapid montage strip: some days looking neat and polished, other days looking messy and disheveled, the changes cycling rapidly. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient throughout each variation. Delicate purple eyebrows shift between pleased and distressed. Its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm, is a constant. The calendar pages have seasonal decorations—flowers, suns, leaves—but no readable dates. Warm academic lighting. no text

prompts.narration_snippet: asking both the students and their classmates
prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A dramatic split-screen panel. On the left, a small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—rates its own appearance on a floating abstract scale, its massive teal-green crystalline eyes sparkling with intense self-scrutiny, the rating wildly swinging between extremes—high one day, crashing low the next, creating a dramatic zigzag pattern like a volatile stock chart. On the right, chibi classmates rate the same character on their own floating scales, but their ratings are nearly flat—barely any variation, a calm straight line with minimal movement. Delicate purple eyebrows on the character are dramatic; the classmates' expressions are indifferent. The character's teal plush backpack with silver moon-and-star embroidery visible on both sides. no text

prompts.narration_snippet: to rate how they looked each day.
prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. Two floating line charts hover side by side in the air, rendered as glowing holographic displays. The left chart—the character's self-rating—is a wild rollercoaster of peaks and valleys, jagged as a seismograph during an earthquake, rendered in vibrant red and gold. The right chart—the classmates' ratings—is nearly flat, a gentle, barely-wavering line in calm blue-green. The contrast between the two charts is comically extreme. Below the charts, a small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—looks between both charts with wide-eyed realization. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with recognition. Delicate purple eyebrows raised in surprise. Its teal plush backpack with silver moon-and-star embroidery catches the chart-glow. no text

prompts.narration_snippet: of their own good and bad days.
prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A rapid two-panel cycle: in the left panel, a small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—is surrounded by a radiant golden glow, looking its absolute best, a tiny halo-like effect hovering above its head. In the right panel, the same character is surrounded by a dark stormy cloud above its head with rain drops falling, looking its absolute worst, disheveled and dim. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient in both panels—bright and confident in the golden panel, dim and defeated in the stormy panel. Delicate purple eyebrows soar triumphantly left, droop sadly right. Its teal plush backpack with silver moon-and-star embroidery visible in both. The cycle between extremes is dramatic and exaggerated. no text

prompts.narration_snippet: look roughly the same to the people around you.
prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. The dramatic split panel from before blends and merges at the center line—the worst-day and best-day versions of the character dissolve into a single neutral, average-looking version as seen through other people's eyes. A small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—stands in the merged center looking exactly the same as always. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient. Delicate purple eyebrows neutral. Its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm, unchanged. Even, warm, unremarkable lighting. Completely ordinary. no text

prompts.narration_snippet: depending on how you look at it.
prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—stands between two doorways, choosing which to walk through. The left doorway is framed in dark grey-blue, leading into a gloomy, misty, muted space—the depressing interpretation. The right doorway is framed in warm gold, leading into a bright, sunlit, vibrant meadow—the liberating interpretation. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, looking between both doors thoughtfully, framed by delicate purple eyebrows in a contemplative neutral expression. Its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm, catches light from the golden doorway. The character's body language is open and undecided. Both doors are equally accessible. no text
